message:
feat: add daily image updates and manual refresh command

Implements automatic image freshness with user control:

Daily Update Logic:
- Check local image age for :latest images
- Auto-pull if older than 24 hours
- Only affects :latest tags (preserves pinned versions)
- Non-blocking: warns if update fails, continues with cached image
- Verbose output shows when images are being updated

Manual Refresh Command:
- `packnplay refresh-default-container` forces pull of default image
- Supports --verbose flag for detailed output
- Useful for getting latest tools and dependencies immediately

Implementation:
- getImageAge() - determines local image age via docker inspect
- shouldUpdateImage() - policy for when to auto-update
- Enhanced ensureImage() - integrates daily update checks
- RefreshDefaultContainer() - manual update function
- Comprehensive TDD test coverage

Benefits:
- Keeps batteries-included container fresh automatically
- User control for immediate updates when needed
- Preserves existing behavior for pinned image versions
- Graceful fallback if updates fail

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+package cmd
+
+import (
+	"github.com/obra/packnplay/pkg/runner"
+	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
+)
+
+var refreshVerbose bool
+
+var refreshCmd = &cobra.Command{
+	Use:   "refresh-default-container",
+	Short: "Pull latest version of default container image",
+	Long:  `Force pull the latest version of the packnplay default container image to get updated tools and dependencies.`,
+	RunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
+		return runner.RefreshDefaultContainer(refreshVerbose)
+	},
+}
+
+func init() {
+	rootCmd.AddCommand(refreshCmd)
+	refreshCmd.Flags().BoolVarP(&refreshVerbose, "verbose", "v", false, "Show detailed output")
+}
\ No newline at end of file
